title: sponia occidentalis
side_effects: Sponia occidentalis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, diarrhea, and abdominal pain, as well as allergic reactions like skin irritation and respiratory issues in some individuals. Overuse or excessive consumption of the plant can also lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as interactions with certain medications. In rare cases, improper use of Sponia occidentalis can cause more severe side effects, including seizures and coma, especially in individuals with pre-existing medical conditions. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Sponia occidentalis for medicinal purposes to minimize the risk of adverse reactions.
